f767b504-610c-4b3e-85b9-de8f55590cea.generated_prompt: A cinematic 3D interior visualization render of a flagship modern master bedroom, captured from a wide three-quarter perspective from the southeast corner to emphasize the precise spatial layout. In the southern half, positioned left-center, a low-profile King Bed is upholstered in a rich caramel brown textured boucle with layered bedding in sand and terracotta linens. Centered against the north wall is a minimalist frameless door in a warm beige matte finish, while the northwest corner features a full-height, floor-to-ceiling lean-to mirror with a slim black steel frame. The northeast corner is arranged as a functional workspace, containing a sleek polished concrete desk and a sculptural modern desk chair with a clean geometric form. Running along the center of the east wall is a large, integrated bookshelf with recessed 2700K LED strip lighting that casts a soft, warm amber glow over curated accessories. The architectural shell consists of smooth sand-toned plaster walls and polished concrete floors with a subtle sheen, reflecting the layered lighting scheme. Global illumination creates soft, realistic ambient occlusion in every corner, while the warm earth-toned palette is unified by professional color grading. The 9-foot ceiling is finished with a clean, shadow-gap perimeter detail, housing recessed spotlights that provide a cozy, atmospheric mood through soft shadows and volumetric light rays, resulting in a photorealistic 3D architectural rendering with impeccable material fidelity.
